dep.name: mcp
dep.purpose: FastMCP framework for MCP server implementation

dep.name: httpx
dep.purpose: Async HTTP client for Responses API calls with persistent AsyncClient

dep.name: python-dotenv
dep.purpose: Load .env file for API key configuration

dep.name: pydantic-settings
dep.purpose: Settings management with env var loading and validation

constraint.reason: FastMCP API changed significantly between 0.x and 1.x; 1.6+ required for current tool decorator features
Uses match/case and modern type hints
Required for AppConfig with env_prefix POLZA_

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic unit checks with mocked API responses (85 tests total)

wave-level.focus: Integration checks with realistic mock data

phase-level.focus: Full test suite including edge cases, retry logic, content limits, and error handling

Testing.mocking-policy: Use httpx mock transports for API tests. Never call real API in tests. Mock CritiqueResult for server tests.

Observability.redaction: Never log API keys, full request bodies with code, or raw response payloads larger than 1KB.

DeliveryShape.shape: Single Python package installed via pip install -e . Runs as MCP stdio server invoked by Kilo Code. No HTTP server, no Docker, no database. Deployed on VM (10.61.11.54:/opt/grok-critic-mcp/repo) via systemd service.
